overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy game showing a character walking through a grand medieval dining hall with floating candles and students seated at long tables, then exiting through large wooden doors into a corridor and entering a statue-filled antechamber.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand dining hall with long house tables and floating candles

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the central aisle toward the front of the hall, approaching the large stained glass window

entered.detail: large ornate stained glass window at the front of the hall with intricate gothic tracery
hundreds of floating candles suspended in mid-air illuminating the high ceiling
long wooden dining tables with students seated, lined with food and drink
long wooden dining tables with students seated, lined with food and drink
tall stone columns supporting the vaulted ceiling
tall stone columns supporting the vaulted ceiling
circular stone fountain basin at the front of the hall

segments.scene_description: The character walks down the central aisle of a vast gothic dining hall, passing long tables where students sit eating. Floating candles illuminate the space from above, and a large stained glass window dominates the far end of the hall.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand dining hall central aisle returning toward entrance

events.description: character turns around at the front fountain and begins walking back toward the hall entrance

agents.ego_description: turns around at the front of the hall and walks back toward the entrance, passing the large central lectern

entered.detail: tall golden stand with an open book and winged decorations
large dark wooden double doors with metal studs at the hall entrance

segments.scene_description: After reaching the front fountain, the character turns and walks back through the hall. The large lectern with an open book becomes visible in the center aisle, and the entrance doors appear in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: carpeted corridor connecting the great hall to the statue room

events.description: character opens the large wooden doors and exits the Great Hall into a narrow corridor

agents.ego_description: approaches the main doors, opens them, and exits into a dimly lit corridor with purple carpeting

entered.detail: purple and gold patterned carpet runner along the corridor floor
stone archway at the end of the corridor
ornate wooden doors leading to the next chamber

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the Great Hall through the large wooden doors, entering a narrow corridor with purple carpeting. The space becomes darker and more enclosed, with another set of doors visible at the far end.

scene_state.functional_zone: statue hall with house monuments and gathered students

events.description: character opens the doors and enters a large room containing statues and other students

agents.ego_description: opens the corridor doors and enters a spacious antechamber with large statues and students gathered near the walls

notable_agents.action: group of students in dark robes standing and conversing near a large statue

entered.detail: tall stone statues of figures in niches along the walls
tall stone statues of figures in niches along the walls
high gothic windows with tracery allowing diffused light to enter
large heraldic shields mounted on the stone walls

segments.scene_description: The character enters a grand antechamber with high ceilings and large stone statues set into wall niches. Several students stand gathered near the statues, and heraldic shields decorate the stone walls. Light filters down from high windows, illuminating the marble floor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the warm, bustling atmosphere of a gothic dining hall into the solemn, echoing space of a statue-filled antechamber. It begins by gliding down the central aisle of a vast hall beneath floating candles and a towering stained glass window, passing students seated at long tables. As the character reaches a front fountain and turns back, the perspective shifts to reveal a central lectern with an open book before moving toward the distant entrance. The scene then transitions through large wooden doors into a darker, enclosed corridor with purple carpeting, leading away from the hall's glow. Finally, the camera emerges into a grand antechamber where light filters from high windows onto marble floors, illuminating heraldic shields and stone statues set into wall niches.
